actions.intent: Start lower route progress without rushing the ice.
Open the lower rescue edge and bring it near extraction.
Break the key ice and adjacent route tax after the dock has room.
Keep the lower route under control.
Stabilize dock with a planned clear before extracting.
Extract the urgent lower puppy before water pressure dominates.
Cash another stabilizing clear during the pivot.
Break the remaining route blockers and extract the upper puppy.

notes: Designer golden for ice/dock timing: route progress, dock stabilization, ice break, urgent rescue, controlled pivot.
